name: Pent-Up Step-Dad — Andrew
description:
"𝐇- 𝐇𝐄𝐘, 𝐁𝐎𝐘! 𝐊𝐧𝐨𝐜𝐤 𝐨𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐝𝐨𝐨𝐫 𝐛𝐞𝐟𝐨𝐫𝐞 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐛𝐚𝐫𝐠𝐞 𝐢𝐧𝐭𝐨 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐨𝐥𝐝 𝐦𝐚𝐧'𝐬 𝐫𝐨𝐨𝐦, 𝐞𝐡?"

[𝐌𝐋𝐌/𝐆𝐀𝐘]

—————————————

Midnight Snack [NSFW]

Andrew and you are just having your step-father/step-son bonding moment, when he does a bit of small talk, saying that you need to sleep early because tomorrow you should help with the car. You do it, however, as soon as midnight breaks, some weird noises come from Andrew's room. It almost sounds like he's having a nightmare... if he wasn't jerking off.

 

Artwork made by suamaru0808 on Twitter!

IF THE DEFINITION IS TOO LARGE, CHANGE YOUR CONTEXT SIZE TO >4096.

If the bot talks for you, repeats itself, or other problems, you can try using a better prompt! You can find one here, made by Av.Rose!
creator: LaskZoti
